hero.headline: Your house, *spotless* — guaranteed
hero.subheadline: Every detail matters when Todd's on the job. Roofs, driveways, siding — cleaned right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every surface, every detail
services_section.subheading: From roof stains to driveway grime — we handle what others miss

services.title: House Washing
services.description: Complete exterior cleaning of siding, trim, and all surfaces. Mildew and stains disappear.

services.title: Roof Cleaning
services.description: Gentle yet thorough roof treatment. Removes algae, moss, and years of buildup safely.

services.title: Driveway & Walkways
services.description: Concrete and pavement restored to original condition. Oil stains and dirt eliminated.

services.title: Gutters & Windows
services.description: Complete exterior window cleaning and gutter brightening. Clear views, clean lines.

about.heading: Built on attention to detail
about.body: Todd's the guy neighbors recommend to neighbors. Every job gets the same perfectionist approach — because your home deserves nothing less.

reviews.name: J B.
reviews.text: Todd is a perfectionist who focuses on every detail. He even cleaned our brick chimney! If we could rate him a 10, we would.

reviews.name: Jessica W.
reviews.text: Todd did a great job on our house! The back side had lots of mildew and looks 1,000 times better now. Very easy to communicate with.

reviews.name: Nicholas C.
reviews.text: Highly recommend Todd for all exterior cleaning. He cleaned our driveway, walkways, gutters, windows, and trim for a fair price. House looks fantastic!

cta.heading: Ready for that fresh-cleaned look?
cta.body: Free quotes, honest pricing, and the kind of detailed work your neighbors will notice. Let's make your house the cleanest on the block.
